narrative: Ukraine-Russia peace overtures and hawkish Fed rhetoric drive a complex risk-on shift — USD/JPY holds at 159.99 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets geopolitical de-escalation; gold higher +0.79%; equities +0.41%; DXY -0.11%; VIX 15.4. Fed's Schmid flags inflation as the primary risk, supporting the +175bp USD/EUR real rate advantage as EUR/USD trades at 1.1617. USD leads G8 (+0.56%) while NZD laggards (-0.90%) on a 1.47% spread. Watch ECB Rate Decision June 11.
